title: Trash
body:
**Trash** is a basic plugin designed for those who want a simple and customizable **/trash** command without requiring the use of plugins like EssentialsX, CMI or other plugins. **Now compatible with **PlaceholderAPI**.** You can support the plugin by making a donation through this link: [https://paypal.me/PabloHernandez601](https://paypal.me/PabloHernandez601)
Join my Support Discord Server
## 📤 Installation Guide This plugin is compatible from version 1.11x to 1.21x. Download the latest version of the plugin and upload it to your server's plugins folder. Once uploaded, restart the server for the changes to take effect. ## ✅ Features: - Simple command **/trash**, is responsible for opening a temporary inventory to delete your objects. - **/trash reload** command for users with trash.reload or OP permissions. - **config.yml** file to customize all functions to the maximum. - Integrated economy to be able to charge for the use of the **/trash** command. (Required [Vault](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/vault.34315/) and Economy Plugin - ex. [XConomy](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/xconomy.75669/)) - Open cooldown. - Trash enable or disable. - Trash Filter (enable/disable) in the config.yml. - Trash Filter you can now block specific items. - Trash Status Discord Webhook ## 🧑‍💼 Permissions: - trash.use (Permission to use **/trash** command) - trash.row.(number) (**Max. 6 rows**) - trash.reload - trash.economy.free - trash.top - trash.toggle ## ⌨️ Commands: - /trash [/t, /basura] - /trash reload - /trash top opens - /trash top items - /trash [enable/disable/toogle] - /trashadmin history (user) ## 📸 Screenshots: ![messages.yml Files](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b6b9e03ba8abba1ea5f72040e3794d32d32921db.png) Various language support will be expanded. ![config.yml](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/978c9faf6e8090841152316047170ffa074ad589.png) Economy parameter of the config.yml file ![Trash can](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b797e1d071d6006dcd3bfda72872f9eb63c0f10b.png) Trash can Inventory ## SpigotMC: [https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/trash-1-18x-1-21x.127985/](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/trash-1-18x-1-21x.127985/)
